html:
Exclusive to:  

The Hibearnation Vest is a Dress Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It costs 1 Thick Fur, 1 Dapper Vest, and 2 Ropes to craft, and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Hibearnation Vest is tier 3 warm clothing, with an insulation factor of 240. It restores 4.4 Sanity/min and reduces the rate Hunger is lost by 25% when equipped. Characters that lose Hunger at a normal rate of 75/day will, instead, lose Hunger at a rate of 56.3/day. Wolfgang's normal form will lose 84.4/day while his mighty form will lose 168.8/day, and Wes will lose 70.3/day (only in DS).

A Hibearnation Vest lasts for 7 days when worn, and a Sewing Kit can be used to repair 71% of its Durability each use.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, the Hibearnation Vest crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a Blueprint for it can be bought with 50 Oincs from The Tinkerer's Tower. The Thick Fur is available at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium.

Tips

  • The Hibearnation Vest is the second best Sanity restoring item in the game, the best one being the Tam o' Shanter and, in the Shipwrecked DLC, the Shark Tooth Crown. It's also the best sanity restoring item for the chest slot.
  • Wearing the Hibearnation Vest will mostly negate the Sanity loss during Dusk or Night, and while in the Caves or Ruins. While equipped the sanity loss from darkness is -0.6/min, a value the game considers too small to show a sanity loss indicator. This, combined with the delay of hunger loss and insulation factor, makes the vest highly useful when exploring the Caves and Ruins in Autumn or Winter.
  • It is not advisable to spend one`s Oincs on the blueprint of the Hibearnation Vest though since the recipe for the Dapper Vest which is needed for crafting is also not available in Hamlet, nor can its blueprint be acquired at The Sty.
  • The vest is used at it's best during winter because of the protection from freezing and the decreased hunger loss.

Trivia

  • "Hibearnation" is a play on the words "Hibernation" and "Bear".
  • Maxwell's and Walani's examination quote references a Simpsons episode where Mr. Burns shows off his collection of clothes made from rare animals.
  • The Hibearnation Vest used to be dropped by Bearger directly, without needing to be crafted.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Willow wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wendy wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • WX-78 wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Woodie wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wes wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Maxwell wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Webber wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Walani wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Warly wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wilbur wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wilba wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wormwood wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wheeler wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Winona wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wortox wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
  • Wurt wearing a Hibearnation Vest.

Exclusive to:
“Welcome to the hibernation station!”
–Wilson
“It's like swimming in fur.”
–Willow
“Big bear shirt.”
–Wolfgang
“Death surrounds me. Well, my torso anyhow.”
–Wendy
“EXTREMELY LUSH VEST”
–WX-78
“Whatever it was, its pelt makes for a fine garment.”
–Wickerbottom
“Now this is some proper winter gear.”
–Woodie
“See my vest.”
–Maxwell
“Appetite suppressing winter apparel! Astonishing!”
–Wagstaff
“I am berserker!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll be the hairiest spider ever.”
–Webber
“Made of real bearger chest!”
–Walani
“Furry refuge from the elements.”
–Warly
“Toasty warm.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS FINE CLOTHS”
–Wilba
“Warm. Cozy”
–Wormwood
“I'll call it my "Wintertime Adventure Vest".”
–Wheeler
“One seriously cozy vest.”
–Winona
“Sometimes you want to wear someone else's fur.”
–Wortox
“Feel warm and fuzzy...”
–Wurt
“Hey Woby, we match!”
–Walter
“It reminds me of that time I was almost eaten by a bearger, but it's cozy.”
–Wanda
The Hibearnation Vest is a Dress Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It costs 1 Thick Fur, 1 Dapper Vest, and 2 Ropes to craft, and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Hibearnation Vest is tier 3 warm clothing, with an insulation factor of 240. It restores 4.4 Sanity/min and reduces the rate Hunger is lost by 25% when equipped. Characters that lose Hunger at a normal rate of 75/day will, instead, lose Hunger at a rate of 56.3/day. Wolfgang's normal form will lose 84.4/day while his mighty form will lose 168.8/day, and Wes will lose 70.3/day (only in DS).
A Hibearnation Vest lasts for 7 days when worn, and a Sewing Kit can be used to repair 71% of its Durability each use.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Hamlet DLC, the Hibearnation Vest crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a Blueprint for it can be bought with 50 Oincs from The Tinkerer's Tower. The Thick Fur is available at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium.
Tips[edit | edit source]
The Hibearnation Vest is the second best Sanity restoring item in the game, the best one being the Tam o' Shanter and, in the Shipwrecked DLC, the Shark Tooth Crown. It's also the best sanity restoring item for the chest slot.
Wearing the Hibearnation Vest will mostly negate the Sanity loss during Dusk or Night, and while in the Caves or Ruins. While equipped the sanity loss from darkness is -0.6/min, a value the game considers too small to show a sanity loss indicator. This, combined with the delay of hunger loss and insulation factor, makes the vest highly useful when exploring the Caves and Ruins in Autumn or Winter.
It is not advisable to spend one`s Oincs on the blueprint of the Hibearnation Vest though since the recipe for the Dapper Vest which is needed for crafting is also not available in Hamlet, nor can its blueprint be acquired at The Sty.
The vest is used at it's best during winter because of the protection from freezing and the decreased hunger loss.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
"Hibearnation" is a play on the words "Hibernation" and "Bear".
Maxwell's and Walani's examination quote references a Simpsons episode where Mr. Burns shows off his collection of clothes made from rare animals.
The Hibearnation Vest used to be dropped by Bearger directly, without needing to be crafted.

It costs 1 [[Thick Fur]], 1 [[Dapper Vest]], and 2 [[Rope]]s to craft, and requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Hibearnation Vest is ''tier 3'' warm clothing, with an [[freezing#mechanics|insulation factor]] of 240. It restores 4.4 [[Sanity]]/min and reduces the rate [[Hunger]] is lost by 25% when equipped. Characters that lose Hunger at a normal rate of 75/day will, instead, lose Hunger at a rate of 56.3/day. [[Wolfgang]]'s normal form will lose 84.4/day while his mighty form will lose 168.8/day, and [[Wes]] will lose 70.3/day (only in DS). A Hibearnation Vest lasts for 7 days when worn, and a [[Sewing Kit]] can be used to repair 71% of its [[Durability]] each use. __NOTOC__ == {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the Hibearnation Vest crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a [[Blueprint]] for it can be bought with 50 [[Oinc]]s from [[The Tinkerer's Tower]]. It's also the best sanity restoring item for the chest slot. * Wearing the Hibearnation Vest will mostly negate the [[Sanity]] loss during [[Dusk]] or [[Night]], and while in the [[Caves]] or [[Ruins]]. While equipped the sanity loss from darkness is -0.6/min, a value the game considers too small to show a sanity loss indicator. This, combined with the delay of hunger loss and insulation factor, makes the vest highly useful when exploring the Caves and Ruins in [[Autumn]] or [[Winter]]. * It is not advisable to spend one`s Oincs on the blueprint of the Hibearnation Vest though since the recipe for the Dapper Vest which is needed for crafting is also not available in Hamlet, nor can its blueprint be acquired at The Sty. * The vest is used at it's best during winter because of the protection from freezing and the decreased hunger loss. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * "Hibearnation" is a play on the words "Hibernation" and "Bear". * [[Maxwell|Maxwell's]] and Walani's examination quote references a ''Simpsons'' episode where Mr. Burns shows off his collection of clothes made from rare animals. *The Hibearnation Vest used to be dropped by Bearger directly, without needing to be crafted. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Hibearnation Vest Dropped.png|Dropped Hibearnation Vest Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Hibearnation Vest Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Hibearnation Vest.
